options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allow_sequential
options.description: for -auto to try cloning at the sequential gates too.

options.name: -auto
options.description: applies cloning and buffering automatically.

options.name: -balance
options.description: force the number of loads on each clone to be within <num>%; default balance is 10%.

options.name: -cells
options.description: Cell or cells to use for the clones. ((libCell/ptnCell)+, optional)

options.name: -delete_buffer_trees
options.description: attempt to delete buffer trees driven by instances to clone.

options.name: -dont_legalize
options.description: may leave cloned instances overlapped with the original ones.

options.name: -dont_resize
options.description: do not resize the original nor new instances.

options.name: -force
options.description: force instance cloning, even if it worsens QoR or causes illegal placement.

options.name: -from
options.description: Specified from pins. ((instTerm|term)+, optional)

options.name: -instances
options.description: Only analyze these instances. ((inst)+, optional)

options.name: -locs
options.description: locations of clones, when numClone is given. if the list has numClone+1 locations, then the first one is for the original gate.

options.name: -loop
options.description: repeat cloning at most <num> times, as far as new instances are being created; original and new instances within the min/max number of loads range are valid targets at each iteration. Default 0, means no limit.

options.name: -max_levels
options.description: traverse back from 'to' at most these many levels. Default 0 (meaning infinite).

options.name: -max_num_loads
options.description: skip cloning instances driving more than these many loads. Default 50000.

options.name: -min_num_loads
options.description: clone instances driving at least these many loads.

options.name: -nets
options.description: Only analyze these nets. ((net)+, optional)

options.name: -numClones
options.description: specifies the number of clones.

options.name: -preview
options.description: show what would be done, but leave netlist untouched.

options.name: -radius
options.description: place clones within a radius of <num> rows from its preferred location based on original instance location and center of mass of new set of loads. Default 10.

options.name: -same_hier_only
options.description: only consider loads in the same hierarchy as the driver.

options.name: -terms
options.description: clusters through a list of term lists. The list is parallel to loc list

options.name: -to
options.description: Specified to pins. ((instTerm|term)+, optional)

options.name: -verbose
options.description: display extra information about what is going on.
